title: The Boy, the Mole, the Fox and the Horse
posterAlt: The Boy, the Mole, the Fox and the Horse (2022) movie poster
tmdbOverview: The unlikely friendship of a boy, a mole, a fox and a horse traveling together in the boy's search for home.
synopsis: Released in 2022, The Boy, the Mole, the Fox and the Horse is a animation, family and drama film from United Kingdom and United States. It holds a solid 7.8 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a G certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
